mapper.sql: id, sys_no, app_paper, data_status, audit_date, index1, index1score, index2, index2score, index3, index3score, index4, index4score, index5, index5score, index6, index6score, index7, index7score, index8, index8score, index9, index9score, index10, index10score, index11, index11score, index12, index12score, expert, audit_status, note, journal_type, number_of_modify
mapper.select: select id as rowId, sys_no as sysNo, app_rowId as appRowId, data_status as dataStatus, audit_date as auditDate, index1, index1score, index2, index2score, index3, index3score, index4, index4score, index5, index5score, index6, index6score, index7, index7score, index8, index8score, index9, index9score, index10, index10score, index11, index11score, index12, index12score, expert, audit_status as auditStatus, note from srm_paper_submission_grade where id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_paper_submission_grade
data_status = #{paperSubmissionGradeDto.dataStatus},
audit_status = #{paperSubmissionGradeDto.auditStatus},
where id=#{paperSubmissionGradeDto.rowId}
